content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves left ahead with the dashed center line sweeping to the upper left, and the car appears well-positioned on the track following the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 26 + 5 = 31
Waypoint 31: (7.272417, 1.565867)
Car position: (6.760414, 0.929292)
Bearing = atan2(1.565867 - 0.929292, 7.272417 - 6.760414) = atan2(0.636575, 0.512003) = atan2(1.2433) ≈ 51.2°
Current heading: 28.896°
Delta = 51.2 - 28.896 = 22.3° → moderate-sharp left turn needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead with delta +22.3° to waypoint 31, so I maintain 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to continue following the curve smoothly.",

    "Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683",
    "Large left-curving loop begins around waypoint 24-30 (y increases rapidly)",
    "Car is slightly left of center (~0.08m) but all wheels on track — acceptable",
    "Use steering_angle=15 for delta 20-30° entering curve at speed 1.5",
    "After the left curve, track loops back and returns — full circuit ~17.7m",
    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and moderate curves",
    "Curve sharpens at wp27-35 (y increases from 1.0 to 2.0), monitor delta closely",
    "Car heading increasing from ~0° to ~29° confirming we are deep in the left curve",
    "Delta ~22° at wp31 confirms moderate-sharp left curve — maintain 15° left steering",
    "Heading increasing steadily each step (~4-5°/step) — curve is consistent and predictable"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.5327, 6.6233, 6.7041, 6.7604],
    "y": [0.7702, 0.8196, 0.8785, 0.9293],

  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 22.3,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
